title: How to Build a Notion CRM That Actually Gets Used
description: Freelancers and small business owners who have abandoned multiple Notion CRM attempts get a concise practitioner guide covering the exact database structure, status logic, and daily capture habit that makes a lightweight CRM stick.
gumroad_description:
You've built three Notion CRMs and abandoned all of them.

Stop designing from scratch. This guide shows you the exact database structure, relationship logic, and daily habit that makes a lightweight CRM actually stick—because it's built for how freelancers and small business owners actually work, not how consultants think you should work.


WHO THIS IS FOR

— Freelancers juggling multiple clients and tired of losing follow-up tasks in email threads
— Small business owners who've tried Pipedrive or HubSpot and found them bloated for their needs
— People who love Notion but keep building CRMs that feel like homework instead of a tool


WHAT'S INSIDE

— The single database structure that handles clients, projects, and pipeline without overcomplication
— How to set up status logic so opportunities move without manual intervention
— The 60-second daily capture habit that keeps your CRM current instead of slowly dying
— Real examples from working CRMs (not theoretical setups)
— Quick-reference templates you can copy into your workspace today


This isn't theory. It's what actually works when you're solo or lean.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
